canonical_definition: An evaluation method to assess if learned latents encode meaningful concepts by training a simple classifier, such as logistic regression, on the sparse activations of an autoencoder.
papers: Learning Multi-Level Features with Matryoshka Sparse Autoencoders
SAEBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Sparse Autoencoders in Language Model Interpretability

definitions.text: An evaluation method to assess if learned latents encode meaningful concepts by training a simple classifier, such as logistic regression, on the sparse activations of an autoencoder.
definitions.paper: Learning Multi-Level Features with Matryoshka Sparse Autoencoders

definitions.text: A method that evaluates whether SAE latents isolate pre-specified concepts by training a linear probe on the top-k most relevant latents and measuring its accuracy.
definitions.paper: SAEBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Sparse Autoencoders in Language Model Interpretability

relationships.paper: SAEBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Sparse Autoencoders in Language Model Interpretability
relationships.evidence: Concept Detection: Measures how precisely individual latents correspond to meaningful concepts through Sparse Probing and Feature Absorption metrics
